column1: The city is beautiful now. All the squares_____________with Christmas trees. (DECORATE)
The teacher said that my English___________greatly_________since the previous year. (IMPROVE)

Oleg is interested in science. When Oleg__________school, he___________Geology. (FINISH/STUDY)
Oleg is a schoolboy. I wonder when he______________school. (FINISH)
There was nobody in the house when I______________from the library. Everybody___________to the airport to pick up my aunt. (RETURN/GO)
He_____________his jacket when the phone____________ . He____________ it. (WASH/RING/NOT ANSWER)

- Why is there water on the floor?

- I____________the jacket. I________________the floor yet. (WASH/NOT DRY)
